'''nadhugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gracilisuchid|gracilisuchid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gracilisuchid|gracilisuchid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nadhugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædhigith|nædhigith]] || [[word:nædhigij|nædhigij]] || [[word:nædhigish|nædhigish]] || [[word:nædhigi|nædhigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhudhuguth|nadhudhuguth]] || [[word:nadhudhuguj|nadhudhuguj]] || [[word:nadhudhugush|nadhudhugush]] || [[word:nadhudhugu|nadhudhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadhuguth|nadhuguth]] || [[word:nadhuguj|nadhuguj]] || [[word:nadhugush|nadhugush]] || [[word:nadhugu|nadhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhufguth|nadhufguth]] || [[word:nadhufguj|nadhufguj]] || [[word:nadhufgush|nadhufgush]] || [[word:nadhufguf|nadhufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadhuguthu|nadhuguthu]] || [[word:nadhuguju|nadhuguju]] || [[word:nadhugushu|nadhugushu]] || [[word:nadhuguku|nadhuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadhuguth|nadhuguth]] || [[word:nadhuguj|nadhuguj]] || [[word:nadhugush|nadhugush]] || [[word:nadhugu|nadhugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadhuguthul|nadhuguthul]] || [[word:nadhugujul|nadhugujul]] || [[word:nadhugushul|nadhugushul]] || [[word:nadhugukul|nadhugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadhuguthuthu|nadhuguthuthu]] || [[word:nadhugujuju|nadhugujuju]] || [[word:nadhugushushu|nadhugushushu]] || [[word:nadhuguku|nadhuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadhuguthun|nadhuguthun]] || [[word:nadhugujun|nadhugujun]] || [[word:nadhugushun|nadhugushun]] || [[word:nadhugukun|nadhugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadhuguthuoro|nadhuguthuoro]] || [[word:nadhugujuoro|nadhugujuoro]] || [[word:nadhugushuoro|nadhugushuoro]] || [[word:nadhugukuoro|nadhugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
